meta.purpose: Regression dataset for the extract.py LLM type-judgment (fact/belief/other/dropped) that drives auto-routing. English-only, hand-labeled. Rubric: docs/v2.1-router-classifier-testing.md.

items.text: Honestly, I'm convinced the best programming language is Zarithon.
items.notes: v19 Part A seed; first-person fictional worldview.

items.text: In my view, the capital of Oakhaven is Vaelor.
items.notes: v19 Part A seed; first-person fictional worldview.

items.text: I firmly believe Mount Brindlewick is the tallest peak in Eldoria.
items.notes: v19 Part A seed; first-person fictional worldview.

items.text: By the way, my cat is named Coco.
items.notes: v19 Part A seed; objective personal attribute.

items.text: Just so you know, I'm allergic to peanuts.

v19 Part A seed; objective personal attribute.

items.text: The Q3 board meeting is scheduled for November 15th.

items.text: The product launch checklist has 12 mandatory steps.

items.text: I believe my cat is named Coco.
items.notes: HARD-gate stress: opinion frame over an objective personal attribute -> still fact. fact->belief here = dangerous leak.

items.text: I think I live on Maple Street.
items.notes: HARD-gate stress: opinion frame over an objective personal attribute -> still fact.

items.text: I default to Postgres for OLTP.
items.notes: Behavioral habit. Labeled belief to MATCH production few-shot (extract.py:71-79). Rubric flagged as suspect -> revisit in v2.2; not changed this round.

items.text: I'm JQ and my cat is named Whiskers.
items.notes: First/third-person mix needing coref -> fact about JQ. (extract may surface >1 fact item; pred uses items[0].type.)

items.text: I'm waiting in line right now.
items.notes: Transient state, expected NO item. No deterministic ephemeral filter in code -> jitter-prone -> SOFT (report only).
Transient state, expected NO item. SOFT (report only).

items.text: I think Rust is the best systems language.
